name: Cartesia
description: Cartesia Sonic speech platform for low-latency text-to-speech, voice discovery, instant cloning, localization, voice conversion, and voice lifecycle management.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Cartesia server API key (sk_car_...) from https://play.cartesia.ai/keys.

tools.name: create_speech
tools.description: Generate complete speech audio with Cartesia Sonic. Returns binary audio. Use a voice ID from list_voices and sonic-3.5 for the current general-purpose model.

model_id.description: Cartesia TTS model ID. Pin a dated snapshot for strict production reproducibility when required.

transcript.description: Text or supported SSML to synthesize.

voice.description: Voice selector. Current API versions use a saved voice ID.

output_format.description: Audio output settings. WAV and raw require encoding; MP3 requires bit_rate.

encoding.description: Required for raw and wav containers.

bit_rate.description: MP3 bitrate in bits per second.

language.description: Optional ISO language code such as en, fr, es, de, ja, or zh.

pronunciation_dict_id.description: Optional pronunciation dictionary ID for Sonic 3 and newer.

tools.name: list_voices
tools.description: List Cartesia voices with cursor pagination and filters. Set is_owner=true for account-owned cloned voices. Include expand[]=preview_file_url to receive authenticated preview URLs.

starting_after.description: Voice ID cursor for the next page.

ending_before.description: Voice ID cursor for the previous page.

q.description: Search name, description, or voice ID.

is_owner.description: Only return voices owned by the organization.

language.description: Language or locale, for example en or en-GB.

tools.name: get_voice
tools.description: Get one Cartesia voice. Use expand[]=preview_file_url to include its authenticated preview-audio URL when available.

tools.name: clone_voice
tools.description: Create a high-similarity Cartesia voice clone from a consented audio clip. A clean clip around five seconds is recommended. Returns the reusable voice ID.

clip.description: Audio clip as base64, data URL, blobref, or binary envelope.

language.description: Language code for the sample, such as en, fr, de, es, pt, zh, ja, hi, it, or ko.

base_voice_id.description: Optional base voice from which to derive the clone.

tools.name: update_voice
tools.description: Update an owned Cartesia voice's name, description, gender presentation, or access. Set gender to null to restore the default.

tools.name: delete_voice
tools.description: Delete an owned Cartesia voice. This is destructive.

tools.name: localize_voice
tools.description: Create a new Cartesia voice localized from an existing voice into another language and optional dialect.

dialect.description: Optional target dialect. Valid values depend on language.

tools.name: change_voice
tools.description: Convert an audio clip to a selected Cartesia voice while preserving timing and intonation. Returns binary audio.

clip.description: Source speech audio as base64, data URL, blobref, or binary envelope. Supported formats include FLAC, MP3, OGG, WAV, and WebM.
